channel.title: Release on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Release on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions now supports MCP resource triggers
item.description:
Azure Functions now generally supports MCP resource triggers for MCP servers hosted on Functions. This lets developers expose resources directly, in addition to tools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is generally available. The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, with an improved merge experience among the highlighted changes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: dotnet: .NET 10.0.5 Out-of-Band Release – macOS Debugger Fix
item.description:
Microsoft released .NET 10.0.5 as an out-of-band update to fix a critical debugger crash on macOS when using Visual Studio Code.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: Release v1.0 of the official MCP C# SDK
item.description:
MCP C# SDK v1.0 focuses on improved authorization handling, expanded metadata support, and added patterns for tool calling and long-running operations.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: github: CodeQL adds Go 1.26 and Kotlin 2.3.10 support and improves query accuracy
item.description:
CodeQL 2.24.2 adds support for Go 1.26 and Kotlin 2.3.10, and includes query accuracy improvements.

  • Source: GitHub
